editApplied.title: Edit Applied Labels
editApplied.description: Load your translation JSON and standardized changes file, then edit applied added/changed labels line by line.
editApplied.listDescription: Each row shows one added/changed key. Edit value and apply line by line.
editApplied.rollbackSuccess: All edits were rolled back. Original file restored.
editApplied.noRollbackBackup: No backup available yet. Apply at least one row first.
editApplied.patchNotFullyApplied: {{count}} change(s) from this patch are not applied in the target file yet. Please use Apply Changes first.
editApplied.invalidChangesFile: Invalid changes file. Expected a JSON array.

createDiff.title: Create Diff
createDiff.description: Generate a diff between two branches for a specific file
createDiff.noDifferences: No differences found between the specified branches for this file.

applyChanges.title: Apply Changes
applyChanges.description: Apply a diff file to update translations
applyChanges.descriptionStandardized: Apply a standardized JSON changes file to update translations safely.
applyChanges.step1: 1) Choose the target translation JSON file.
applyChanges.step2: 2) Choose the standardized changes JSON file.
applyChanges.step3: 3) Review each change and decide to apply or reject it.
applyChanges.alreadyAppliedMessage: This change is already present in the target file.
applyChanges.invalidChangesFile: Invalid changes file. Expected a JSON array.
applyChanges.invalidScreenUrlAt: Invalid screen URL at item {{index}}. Use a full http(s) URL.
applyChanges.noChangesFound: No changes were found in the selected file.
applyChanges.emptyOutputError: No content generated from selected changes.
applyChanges.abortSuccess: Process aborted. Original file restored from backup.
